name: paywall-gallery-apps
description: Structured manifest for the public PaywallPro paywall gallery.

fields.app_name: App Store display name in the US storefront.
fields.slug: Stable repository slug generated from the App name.
fields.mrr_usd: Estimated monthly recurring revenue in USD.
fields.category_rank: App Store category ranking where available.
fields.version_release_date: Release date for the captured version.
fields.versions_count: Number of captured versions available in PaywallPro for this App.
fields.onboarding_count: Number of onboarding preview screens in the Onboarding segment of the captured video timeline.
fields.walkthrough_count: Number of onboarding preview screens in the Walkthrough segment of the captured video timeline (after the boundary).
fields.paywall_type: Paywall classification from PaywallPro. When multiple distinct paywall types are observed across the captured pages, this is a comma-separated list in capture order.
fields.pricing: Human-readable pricing model summary extracted from the captured paywall.
fields.pricing_group_count: Number of distinct public offer sets shown in the preview.
fields.markdown_path: Relative path to the App case page.
fields.featured_image: Relative path to the featured compressed WebP preview image.
fields.screenshot_images: Relative paths to supporting compressed WebP preview images.
fields.paywallpro_url: PaywallPro detail link with GitHub campaign attribution.
fields.full_gallery_url: PaywallPro detail link for the complete screenshot and version history.
fields.last_generated_at: UTC date when this public record was generated.
